publishedAbstract: * No OSD pods are running in an OCS 4.x cluster, even when the OSD Prepare pods are in `Completed` state, Why? * After a fresh deployment of OCS 4.x cluster, the NooBaa DB pod is stuck in `Pending` state. * OSD deployment getting skipped with the following message: ~~~ 2022-06-09 09:37:33.372810 I | cephosd: skipping osd0: "5e41bd64b41f" running on a different ceph cluster "30d36ad9b5c5" ~~~
publishedTitle: No OSD pods are running in an OCS 4.x cluster, even when the OSD Prepare pods are in Completed state, Why?
